title: bus.remediation.applied v1
description: Explicit remediation event — signals that a known alert kind was addressed by a known fix. Enables the dashboard to distinguish auto-decay 'stabilizing' (STAB) from explicit-remediation 'stabilizing' (STAB-FX) and tag regressions post-fix as louder than auto-decay regressions. Published by deer-improve after Tier-4 patches, by loomies on bead close, or manually via 'nervous publish bus.remediation.applied ...'.

targets_pathology.description: Alert kind tuple + criteria this fix addresses. Matches AlertKind.kind_tuple fields.

failure_reason.description: bus.dead_letter failure_reason match — present when kind[0] == 'dlq'

fix_summary.description: Human-readable description of what was done

applied_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when the fix was applied

applied_by.description: Agent ID or human name that applied the fix (e.g. loom-XXXX, human:eric)

expected_resolution_window_s.description: Seconds after applied_at during which recurrence should NOT happen (if recurrence happens before this window closes, alert is marked regressed-FX)

rollback_at.description: Optional deadline — if pathology is still active at this time, consider rollback/alert escalation

saga_id.description: bus.saga correlation ID if this remediation was part of a coordinated plan

bead_id.description: Bead ID if this remediation was filed as a bead
